meta.name: TIPI Ten-Item Personality Inventory
meta.description: The TIPI is an ultra-brief version of the Big Five personality scale, using only 10 items to quickly assess five personality dimensions: Extraversion, Agreeableness, Conscientiousness, Emotional Stability, and Openness. It is suitable for time-limited research and rapid screening.
meta.author: Gosling, Rentfrow & Swann (2003)
meta.reference: Gosling SD, Rentfrow PJ, Swann WB Jr. A very brief measure of the Big-Five personality domains. J Res Pers. 2003;37(6):504-528.
meta.instruction: Here are a number of personality traits that may or may not apply to you. Please indicate the extent to which you agree or disagree with each statement. I see myself as:

extraversion.label: Low
extraversion.description: Low extraversion; tends toward introversion, quietness, and solitude.

extraversion.label: Average
extraversion.description: Average extraversion; able to balance socializing and alone time.

extraversion.label: Above Average
extraversion.description: Above average extraversion; tends to enjoy social interaction and group activities.

extraversion.label: High
extraversion.description: High extraversion; outgoing and enthusiastic, enjoys social activities, and is energetic.

agreeableness.label: Low
agreeableness.description: Low agreeableness; tends toward independence, competitiveness, and questioning others.

agreeableness.label: Average
agreeableness.description: Average agreeableness; able to balance cooperation and assertiveness.

agreeableness.label: Above Average
agreeableness.description: Above average agreeableness; tends to be friendly and considerate.

agreeableness.label: High
agreeableness.description: High agreeableness; compassionate, cooperative, and caring about others.

conscientiousness.label: Low
conscientiousness.description: Low conscientiousness; tends to be flexible and spontaneous, with less focus on details and planning.

conscientiousness.label: Average
conscientiousness.description: Average conscientiousness; able to balance order and flexibility.

conscientiousness.label: Above Average
conscientiousness.description: Above average conscientiousness; tends to be organized and self-disciplined.

conscientiousness.label: High
conscientiousness.description: High conscientiousness; thorough, responsible, organized, and highly self-disciplined.

emotional_stability.label: Low
emotional_stability.description: Low emotional stability; prone to anxiety and mood swings.

emotional_stability.label: Average
emotional_stability.description: Average emotional stability; generally able to manage emotions well most of the time.

emotional_stability.label: Above Average
emotional_stability.description: Above average emotional stability; tends to be calm and resilient.

emotional_stability.label: High
emotional_stability.description: High emotional stability; calm, composed, highly resilient, and not easily affected by emotions.

openness.label: Low
openness.description: Low openness; tends toward tradition, practicality, and preference for the familiar.

openness.label: Average
openness.description: Average openness; able to balance innovation and tradition.

openness.label: Above Average
openness.description: Above average openness; tends to be curious and imaginative.

openness.label: High
openness.description: High openness; curious, creative, and open to new experiences and perspectives.
